description: 完整 Prompt 模板。用 {{placeholder.field}} 标注占位符，引用其他词库 (如 {{space.name_en}}, {{style.keywords_en}}, {{lighting.keywords_en}})。LLM 在润色阶段会按规则展开。词序规则参考 hashmil/stablediffusion-midjourney-prompts: style → composition → medium → camera → subject → environment → lighting → atmosphere → mood → quality.

placeholder_syntax.optional_block: [[...内容...]] — 整段可选块，对应字段为空则整段省略
placeholder_syntax.freetext: {{freetext_en}} — 用户自由文本（已由 LLM 译为英文）

templates.description_zh: 适用于绝大多数室内设计场景，最稳的默认模板。
templates.structure_zh: 主体类型 → 设计风格 → 空间 → 家具 → 材质 → 配色 → 光线/季节 → 摄影参数 → 构图 → 氛围/画质 → 比例
templates.template_en: Interior design photograph of {{space.name_en}}, {{style.keywords_en|join:', '}}, featuring {{furniture.keywords_en|join:', '}}, {{materials.keywords_en|join:', '}} materials, {{colors.keywords_en|join:', '}} color palette, {{lighting.keywords_en|join:', '}}, {{season.keywords_en}} {{weather.keywords_en}}, [[shot on {{camera.body.name_en}} with {{camera.lens.name_en}} at {{camera.aperture.name_en}} ISO {{camera.iso.name_en}}, ]]{{composition.perspective.keywords_en}}, {{composition.shot.keywords_en}}, {{mood.keywords_en|join:', '}}, [[in the style of {{artist.keywords_en}}, ]]{{quality_modifiers.keywords_en|join:', '}}, {{freetext_en}}
templates.example_output_en: Interior design photograph of modern minimalist living room with double-height ceiling, japandi style, warm wood tones, low-profile design, featuring oak coffee table, linen sofa, ceramic vase, oak wood, lime wash wall, linen, warm beige and cream palette, soft natural daylight streaming through tall windows, spring morning, shot on Sony A7R V with 24mm wide-angle lens at f/2.8 ISO 200, two-point perspective, wide establishing shot, cozy intimate atmosphere, serene tranquil, in the style of Vincent Van Duysen, photorealistic, 8K UHD resolution, highly detailed, cinematic composition --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6.1

templates.name_zh: 建筑可视化（照片级真实）
templates.description_zh: 建筑可视化场景，强化结构准确性和照片真实感。适合提案展示。
templates.structure_zh: Archviz 主体 → 空间结构 → 风格 → 材质 → 自然光 → 专业相机 → 全局光照 → 比例
templates.template_en: Architectural interior photography of {{space.name_en}}, {{style.keywords_en|random:2}}, {{materials.keywords_en|join:', '}} surfaces, {{colors.keywords_en|join:', '}} tones, {{lighting.keywords_en|join:', '}}, shot on {{camera.body.name_en}} with {{camera.lens.name_en}}, {{composition.perspective.keywords_en}}, realistic global illumination, V-Ray architectural render quality, photorealistic, 8K UHD, highly detailed materials, sharp focus, by James McDonald and Joarc Architects, {{freetext_en}}
templates.example_output_en: Architectural interior photography of double-height modern villa living room, modern minimalist, biophilic design, oak wood flooring, board-formed concrete walls, floor-to-ceiling glass, warm neutrals tones, golden hour sunlight casting long shadows, shot on Canon EOS R5 with 16-35mm ultra wide-angle, two-point perspective, realistic global illumination, V-Ray architectural render quality, photorealistic, 8K UHD, highly detailed materials, sharp focus, by James McDonald and Joarc Architects --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6.1 --no people, blur, distortion

templates.description_zh: 日式 + 北欧融合风（Japandi）或侘寂风住宅。强调材质质感、自然光、安静氛围。
templates.structure_zh: 侘寂/Japandi 主体 → 自然材质 → 柔和自然光 → 浅景深 → 禅意氛围
templates.template_en: Serene interior photograph of {{space.name_en}}, Japandi minimalism, wabi-sabi aesthetic, {{materials.keywords_en|join:', '}}, raw natural textures, {{furniture.keywords_en|random:3}}, muted earthy color palette of warm beige and clay tones, soft diffused natural daylight through paper screens, {{composition.perspective.keywords_en}}, shallow depth of field, in the style of Axel Vervoordt and Vincent Van Duysen, photorealistic, magazine editorial quality, Kinfolk magazine aesthetic, highly detailed, {{freetext_en}}

templates.description_zh: 豪华别墅夜景灯光场景。室内暖光 + 室外蓝调时刻。
templates.structure_zh: 奢华主体 → 大尺度空间 → 夜景灯光 → 室外蓝调 → 电影感

templates.description_zh: 新中式风格，国内市场最常用模板。融合现代极简和传统中式元素。
templates.structure_zh: 新中式主体 → 传统材料现代化 → 留白构图 → 茶/书/禅元素 → 柔和东方光

templates.structure_zh: 商业主体 → 风格特征 → 业态家具 → 招牌饮品/产品 → 顾客活动暗示（不显示人物）→ 氛围光

templates.description_zh: 现代办公室、联合办公空间、CEO 办公室等场景。
templates.structure_zh: 办公主体 → 现代/科技/极简风格 → 协作家具 → 自然光+办公照明 → 专业感

templates.description_zh: 大尺度奢华公共空间。酒店大堂、会所、艺术画廊等。
templates.structure_zh: 公共大空间 → 奢华风格 → 大型雕塑装置 → 戏剧化照明 → 仰视/对称构图

templates.structure_zh: 户外主体 → 景观风格 → 植物+水景+硬质铺装 → 自然光时段 → 室内外渗透

templates.structure_zh: 儿童房主体 → 趣味/北欧/蒙特梭利风格 → 低位家具 → 玩具收纳 → 明亮配色 → 柔和自然光

templates.name_zh: 视频原模板 · 北玄 v4.0 现代别墅
templates.name_en: Original Video Template · BoHyun v4.0 Modern Villa
templates.description_zh: 完整复刻视频中北玄 v4.0 演示的'现代林间木质别墅'生成模板，用于对标和回归测试。
templates.structure_zh: 主体类型：现代林间木质别墅 → 双层挑高空间 → 木质材料主导 → 落地窗大量自然光 → Hasselblad/Sony 高端相机 → 8K 高清
templates.template_en: Interior design photograph of a modern wood-clad villa nestled in a forest, double-height living room with floor-to-ceiling windows, warm oak wood paneling throughout, board-formed concrete fireplace, plush low-profile sectional sofa in oatmeal linen, large jute area rug, sculptural floor lamp, abundant natural daylight pouring through tall windows revealing forest view, comfortable sunlight, spring afternoon, shot on Hasselblad X2D 100C with 38mm lens at f/4 ISO 200, two-point perspective wide shot, cozy intimate atmosphere, biophilic warmth, serene tranquil, in the style of Tadao Ando and Vincent Van Duysen, photorealistic, 8K UHD resolution, highly detailed, cinematic composition, magazine editorial quality Architectural Digest cover

word_order: 13. user freetext (woven into appropriate position by LLM)
assembly_rules.length_target_words: 60-120 words for the main prompt body (excluding suffix)
key_principles: Specificity beats verbosity — concrete materials/objects beat vague descriptors
Lead with subject and style — they anchor the model's interpretation
Quality modifiers always sit at the tail
For Midjourney: keep total token count under model limit, use --ar suffix correctly
For Stable Diffusion/Flux: put negative prompts in separate field, not in main prompt
Reuse signature_colors and signature_materials from style entries when freetext is sparse

model_specific_notes.midjourney: 使用 --ar 比例参数；--no 替代负向词；--style raw 防止过度风格化；--v 6.1 / --v 7 当前主流版本。
model_specific_notes.flux: Flux Pro/Dev 对长 Prompt 友好，可保留全部细节。负向词单独输入字段。
model_specific_notes.stable-diffusion: 建议 75 tokens 内或使用 BREAK 语法分段。负向词单独输入字段，全用 global+realism+architecture 三组。
model_specific_notes.tongyi-wanxiang: 通义万相中文友好，可直接传中文 Prompt 或英文 Prompt。负向词支持。
model_specific_notes.jimeng: 即梦支持中英文，对'室内设计' '现代风格'等中文表达识别极佳，可保留少量中文关键词。
